description:
【Stainless steel tooth comb ，Extremely Durable 】Cat hair brush is made of abs plastic and stainless steel pin.Lick harmless, support full body wash, prevent static electricity.

【Rubber massage needle design】The end of each massage needle is covered with white soft silicone. It can protect pet skin and prevent skin diseases.

【One-click Cleaning Button】After brushing your pet, simply click the button.The button of shedding brush on the handle saves time and energy when grooming and cleaning.

【Widely used】This grooming brush is designed for short, medium or long, thick dogs/cats, making your pets healthy, gently removes undercoat and loose hair.

【 Product size 】18.5*12.0*4.5cm, light weight, easy to use.
